好像。。比刚刚twoEs1难一点？答案用SPCCTF{}包裹



两个e咋不互素？

```python
from Cryptodome.Util.number import *
import random

flag=b"SPCCTF{********}"

p, q = getPrime(512), getPrime(512)
n = p * q

e1 = random.getrandbits(32)
e2 = random.getrandbits(32)

m = bytes_to_long(flag)
c1 = pow(m, e1, n)
c2 = pow(m, e2, n)

print(f'{n = }')
print(f'{e1 = }')
print(f'{e2 = }')
print(f'{c1 = }')
print(f'{c2 = }')

'''
n = 
e1 = 3739335288
e2 = 3124897683
c1 = 
c2 = 
'''
```

```python
import gmpy2
from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes

n = 
e1 = 3739335288
e2 = 3124897683
c1 = 
c2 = 

g = gmpy2.gcd(e1, e2)
print("gcd(e1, e2) =", g)

e1p = e1 // g
e2p = e2 // g

# 扩展欧几里得
gcd, s, t = gmpy2.gcdext(e1p, e2p)
print("gcd(e1', e2') =", gcd)
print("s, t =", s, t)

# 注意 s 或 t 可能是负数
if s < 0:
    c1_inv = gmpy2.invert(c1, n)
    part1 = pow(c1_inv, -s, n)
else:
    part1 = pow(c1, s, n)

if t < 0:
    c2_inv = gmpy2.invert(c2, n)
    part2 = pow(c2_inv, -t, n)
else:
    part2 = pow(c2, t, n)

M = (part1 * part2) % n

# 现在 M = m^3
# 开三次方
m, exact = gmpy2.iroot(M, 3)
if exact:
    print("Found m:")
    print(long_to_bytes(int(m)).decode())
else:
    print("Cube root not exact, need to check padding etc.")
```

gcd(e1, e2) = 3

gcd(e1', e2') = 1

s, t = 263546427 -315366631

Found m:

SPCCTF{3z_C0mm0n_M0du1u5_4774ck}
